nasb.text: Thus I will punish the world for its evil And the wicked for their iniquity; I will also put an end to the arrogance of the proud And abase the haughtiness of the ruthless.

esv.text: I will punish the world for its evil, and the wicked for their iniquity; I will put an end to the pomp of the arrogant, and lay low the pompous pride of the ruthless.

cnv.text: 我必因世界的邪惡施行刑罰， 也必因惡人的罪孽懲罰他們； 我要使狂妄人的驕傲止息， 使強暴人的狂傲降卑。

ccb.text: 我必惩罚这罪恶的世界， 惩治邪恶的世人， 制止骄横之人的狂妄， 压下残暴之徒的骄傲。

csbs.text: 我要因世界的邪恶惩罚世界， 因恶人的罪孽惩罚恶人； 我要使傲慢人的骄傲止息， 使强横者的高傲降卑。
